security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: A desktop application for fiction writers to write and organize scenes freely, centralize the story universe, maintain consistency, revise with annotations, and export clean manuscripts.
